subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Mihraban
subcodes.first_line: O Mihrábán! One of the friends hath evoked thy remembrance; thus have We remembered thee.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهربان دوستی از دوستان یادت نمود یادت نمودیم امروز آنچه دیده می شود گواهی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @knowledge; recognition of God, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @true liberty; freedom
